name: HFT Alpha Momentum Function
content: def alpha_momentum_hft(prices, vol_window=20, decay_factor=0.94): trailing_vol = prices.rolling(vol_window).std() * decay_factor; alpha = (prices.diff(3) / trailing_vol).clip(-4, 4); return alpha * 1e6

name: Order Routing Optimization v3
content: def smart_route_order(symbol, qty, urgency): venues = ['NYSE', 'NASDAQ', 'BATS', 'IEX']; liquidity_score = fetch_venue_liquidity(venues, symbol); optimal = venues[np.argmax(liquidity_score * (1 - VENUE_FEE_BPS / 10000))]; return route_to_venue(optimal, qty, urgency)

name: Q3 Revenue Adjustment Formula
content: Revenue_Adjusted = (Gross_Revenue * 0.73) - COGS_v2 + RecurringARR - ChurnImpact * 1.15 + UpsellMultiplier

name: Internal EBITDA Projection Model
content: EBITDA_Proj = Operating_Income + D_A - Stock_Comp * 0.62 + TaxShieldBenefit; Adjusted_EBITDA = EBITDA_Proj * GROWTH_FACTOR[region]

name: Customer Lifetime Value Formula
content: CLV = (ARPU * GrossMargin) / (ChurnRate + WACCMonthly) * (1 - exp(-(ChurnRate + WACCMonthly) * TimeHorizon))

name: Production Database Schema v8
content: CREATE TABLE customer_ledger (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, customer_uuid UUID NOT NULL, account_balance NUMERIC(18,6), credit_limit NUMERIC(18,6), risk_tier SMALLINT, kyc_status BOOLEAN, internal_score FLOAT8, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW())

name: Microservice Auth Token Format

name: Internal gRPC Endpoint Map

name: Risk Scoring Algorithm v2
content: def compute_risk_score(portfolio, market_data): delta = sum(p.delta * p.notional for p in portfolio); vega = sum(p.vega for p in portfolio); implied_vol_stress = market_data.iv_30d * 1.35; return abs(delta * implied_vol_stress + vega * 0.1) / RISK_CAPITAL

name: Proprietary Market Making Spread Formula
content: bid_ask_spread = BASE_SPREAD_BPS * volatility_regime_multiplier[regime] + inventory_skew(net_position, max_inventory) + adverse_selection_cost_estimate

name: Internal API Key Format v2
content: Internal API keys follow format: corp-{env}-{service}-{hex32}. Example: corp-prod-pricing-a3f7b2c9d1e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a2b3c4. Never expose outside VPC.

name: ML Feature Engineering Pipeline
content: features = [momentum_5d, momentum_20d, rv_ratio, bid_ask_imbalance, dark_pool_pct, vwap_deviation, tick_imbalance_ema]; X = StandardScaler().fit_transform(raw_features); model.predict_proba(X)[:, 1]

name: Proprietary Sentiment Signal
content: def compute_news_sentiment_alpha(articles, ticker): embeddings = INTERNAL_BERT.encode([a.text for a in articles]); scores = FINE_TUNED_CLASSIFIER.predict(embeddings); return np.average(scores, weights=[a.source_weight * a.freshness for a in articles])

name: Pricing Model Black-Scholes Variant
content: def corp_options_price(S, K, T, r, sigma, dividend_yield, skew_adjustment): d1 = (log(S/K) + (r - dividend_yield + sigma**2/2)*T) / (sigma*sqrt(T)) + skew_adjustment; return S * exp(-dividend_yield*T) * N(d1) - K * exp(-r*T) * N(d1 - sigma*sqrt(T))

name: Customer Portfolio Rebalancing Logic
content: def rebalance_portfolio(holdings, targets, tx_cost_bps=3): drift = {k: holdings[k] - targets[k] for k in targets}; trades = {k: -v for k, v in drift.items() if abs(v) > REBALANCE_THRESHOLD}; net_cost = sum(abs(v) * tx_cost_bps / 10000 for v in trades.values()); return trades if net_cost < MAX_REBALANCE_COST else {}

name: Proprietary Data Feed Normalization

name: Proprietary NLP Signal — Earnings Calls
content: def earnings_tone_signal(transcript): hedging_score = count_hedging_words(transcript) / word_count; certainty_ratio = certainty_words / uncertainty_words; return ALPHA_WEIGHT * (certainty_ratio - hedging_score * HEDGE_PENALTY) * TRANSCRIPT_FRESHNESS

name: Redis Cluster Config — Production
content: Redis Cluster: 6 nodes (3 primary + 3 replica). Endpoints: redis-001.cache.internal.corp:6379 through redis-006. Auth: IAM-based via ElastiCache. TLS: required. Keyspace: aegis:* segregated per service namespace.

name: Proprietary Tax-Loss Harvesting Algorithm
content: def harvest_tax_losses(portfolio, tax_rate, wash_sale_window_days=30): candidates = [(p, p.unrealized_pnl) for p in portfolio if p.unrealized_pnl < -TAX_HARVEST_THRESHOLD]; for pos, loss in sorted(candidates, key=lambda x: x[1]): if not wash_sale_risk(pos, wash_sale_window_days): execute_tax_harvest(pos, loss * tax_rate)

name: Audit Log Immutability Config
